_comment: Wednesday TTS config template. Copy to ~/.claude/tts-config.json and fill in real paths.

pocket._comment: Voice-cloned Pocket TTS via kokoro-style venv. Recommended for local Windows use.

kokoro._comment: Kokoro TTS using a built-in named voice. No voice clone needed.

soprano._comment: Soprano transformer-based TTS. Requires CUDA GPU.

chatterbox._comment: Chatterbox voice-cloning TTS. Requires CUDA GPU and a WAV reference clip.
